meaning: <德>Bundesnachrichtendienst (德意志联邦共和国) 联邦情报局 (=Federal Intelligence Service)
examples: Bnd a pound of mince, too.
Bnd by the way, could I have a look at your room card?
Declarative services which are now supported by BND has had some of the limitations removed.
However, investors were quick to see advantages in BND over AGG, and money started flowing in.
Of that total, the BND believes a quarter to be involved in making weapons.
